row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: The ego vehicle appears to be moving forward through an intersection and then continuing straight along a city street.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate vehicles ahead; green lines suggest lane boundaries or path planning; blue lines may represent other trajectories. The trajectory shows a smooth forward progression.

semantic.scene_summary: A real-world urban driving scene captured from a vehicle's perspective. The view includes a multi-lane road with clear markings, intersections, buildings on both sides, traffic lights, and parked or moving vehicles.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible with natural lighting and shadows. No significant occlusions or distortions observed.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion is smooth and continuous across frames. Objects move naturally without abrupt jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles and infrastructure remain consistently present and correctly positioned relative to each other over time.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and environmental features maintain structural integrity throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle proceeds forward steadily through the intersection and continues along the road.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions are visually apparent. Traffic flow appears orderly.

semantic.scene_summary: An AI-generated version of the same urban driving scene. It replicates the general layout but exhibits some visual artifacts and inconsistencies in object rendering.
semantic.visibility_notes: Some objects show blurring, duplication, or texture warping. Lighting and shadow consistency is slightly off compared to Row 1.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Most motion is smooth, but occasional flickering or slight positional jitter occurs in certain objects (e.g., distant cars).
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames, though some exhibit minor disappearance/reappearance cycles or shape deformation.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall structure remains intact, but subtle warping or stretching of buildings and roads can be seen in some frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego motion mimics the reference — forward movement through the intersection and continuation down the street.
decision.risk_context: No overt risk indicators, but reduced clarity in traffic elements may affect downstream interpretation reliability.

newly_introduced_elements: minor ghosting effects around moving vehicles
artifacts_or_instabilities: slight frame-to-frame jitter in object positions
